prompt: What system accessibility preferences should I check beyond Reduce Motion? I want to build a truly adaptive UI.

assertions.text: Lists reduceTransparency with replacement pattern (solid bg vs .ultraThinMaterial)
assertions.rationale: Skill documents reduce transparency → solid background replacement

assertions.text: Lists legibilityWeight (.bold) for bold text preference
assertions.rationale: Skill documents bold text environment value

assertions.text: Lists colorSchemeContrast for Increase Contrast preference
assertions.rationale: Skill includes increased contrast; WITHOUT typically misses 2+ settings
Skill's smart invert section for real-world content
